title: jurinea humilis subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Jurinea humilis subsp. pyrenaica, also known as the Pyrenean jurinea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea humilis subsp. pyrenaica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be consumed as a supplement or used topically in creams and ointments.
